title: briza media f. pauciflora
intro: Briza media f. pauciflora, also known as the lesser quaking grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The lesser quaking grass is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
